github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Use Vitest and @testing-library/react. Tests live in src/test/ and follow the naming pattern <subject>.test.ts or <subject>.test.tsx. Use describe/it/expect blocks.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Ensure TypeScript strict mode compliance. Verify that all UI strings go through the i18n layer (src/lib/i18n.tsx). Check that Tailwind CSS is used for all styling and that class names are composed with cn() from @/lib/utils.
